creator: merlyn500@gmail.com
text:
Hi all.
This problem is caused by locale settings.
Workaround:
You should have build with default (C) locales.
This problem is observed with czech and slovakia locale, so if you 
have one of theese locales, make sure, you build with C locale.
Don't forget, if you switch users with 'su', locale are preserved! (at 
least on my system).
Hope, this will be usefull for someone.
Regards,
Milan Bartos
